category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Chroma as a general purpose syntax highlighter in pure Go.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides chroma; source_facts.homepage is the official alecthomas/chroma repository using the Chroma name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; the README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains an upstream repository value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies syntax highlighting in Go; source_facts.executables lists the chroma CLI.
